<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\TimeSeries; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/ts.createrule/ * * Create a compaction rule */ class TSCREATERULE extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'TS.CREATERULE'; } public function setArguments(array $arguments) { [$sourceKey, $destKey, $aggregator, $bucketDuration] = $arguments; $processedArguments = [$sourceKey, $destKey, 'AGGREGATION', $aggregator, $bucketDuration]; if (count($arguments) === 5) { $processedArguments[] = $arguments[4]; } parent::setArguments($processedArguments); } }
